allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Migrate ExportCertificate \(URI overload\) to options pattern

- Created ExportFromUrlOptions and ExportResult models
- Added ExportFromUrl method to CertificateOperationsV2
- Updated ExportCommand to use V2 API for URL exports
- Added WriteExportResult to formatters \(text and JSON\)
- URL export now supports --format json
- Follows modern pattern: options object, structured result, quiet operation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Added phase 6 implementation plan for certificate expiration monitoring.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
